{ "name": "mayeulak/breadcrumbs", "description": "A reusable breadcrumb component for Laravel", "type": "laravel-package", "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Bedigit\\Breadcrumbs\\": "src/" } }, "extra": { "laravel": { "providers": [ "Bedigit\\Breadcrumbs\\BreadcrumbServiceProvider" ], "aliases": { "Breadcrumb": "Bedigit\\Breadcrumbs\\BreadcrumbFacade" } } } }
